bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid across all issues. The opponent opened with all valueC, which is the lowest-utility valid offer for me and gives no evidence yet of meaningful concession, so I will counter firmly with my preferred values.

At t=0.02 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making a small concession to avoid simply repeating my prior all-valueA offer. The opponent has moved from all valueC to valueB on issueA and issueB, which improves my utility somewhat, but they remain far from my preferred outcome on most issues, so I will hold firm on my highest-weight issues and concede only on a low-weight issue.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.92 because it is still very early at t=0.04, so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent has been conceding on my important issues A and B, while holding C-F at valueC, so I concede only on a low-weight issueD while holding firm on the higher-weight issues.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.88 because it is still very early, so there is no need to concede on my most important issues yet. The opponent has consistently pushed issueC through issueF toward valueC, while only partially conceding on issueA and issueB, so I will hold firm on issueA/issueB/issueC and make a small additional concession on a low-weight issue. Their last offer was worse for me than their prior one, so I should not reward that with a large concession.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.84 because it is still very early in the negotiation, so there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent has moved toward my preferences on high-weight issues A and B, but keeps offering valueC on C-F, so I am conceding further on low-weight D/E while holding firm on the more important A/B/C and keeping F favorable for now.

At t=0.10 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.80 while making a modest concession on lower-weight issues. The opponent has conceded substantially on issueA and issueB and recently moved issueC from valueC to valueB, while consistently holding issueD/E/F at valueC, so I will keep my high-weight issues strong and offer movement on low-weight issueF without repeating my prior bid.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.76, keeping my high-weight issues A, B, and C at valueA while conceding the lower-weight D, E, and F to valueC. It is still early at t=0.12, so I do not need to match the opponent’s low offers on issueC yet; their bids show they have conceded on issueA and issueB but are holding firm on D/E/F and mostly C, so I am trading on my lowest-weight issues first.

I am targeting a utility around 0.76 by holding firm on the three highest-weight issues A, B, and C while conceding the lower-weight D, E, and F to valueC. Time is still early at t=0.14, and the opponent has been improving their offers toward my preferences on issueA and issueB while still pushing hard for valueC on lower-weight issues, so I will not yet concede issueC from valueA.

I am targeting a utility around 0.72, making a modest early concession on issueC from valueA to valueB while holding firm on the most important issues A and B. The opponent has repeatedly offered issueA and issueB at valueA and recently improved issueC to valueB, but they still hold D/E/F at valueC, so I keep most low-weight concessions there while asking for valueB on issueF to avoid simply repeating my last bid.

I am targeting about 0.72 utility, which is a moderate early concession while still protecting the highest-weight issues A and B. The opponent has consistently moved up to valueA on issueA and issueB and recently holds issueC at valueB while keeping D/E/F low, so I will accept their direction on lower-weight issues but ask for one small improvement on issueE instead of repeating my last bid.

At t=0.20 I am still aiming for a strong utility around 0.72 rather than immediately accepting the opponent’s 0.58 latest bid. The opponent has repeatedly conceded on my high-weight issueA and issueB and sometimes issueC, but has held firm on issueD/issueE/issueF at valueC, so I concede most low-weight issues while asking for one small improvement on issueF. No messages were provided, so I rely only on the offer pattern.

I am targeting about 0.723 utility by holding firm on the high-weight issues A and B and accepting the opponent’s repeated signal around issueC=valueB. Since it is still relatively early at t=0.22, I am only asking for a small improvement on one low-weight issue rather than conceding fully to their latest 0.682-utility offer; the opponent’s bids consistently keep D/E/F at valueC, so I am rotating the requested concession to avoid repeating my exact last bid.

I am targeting about 0.72 utility by holding my high-weight issueA and issueB at valueA and keeping issueC at the opponent’s repeated concession to valueB, while only asking for a small improvement on a low-weight issue. I am targeting a utility around 0.68, which is below my recent counters but still comfortably above reservation and likely to secure agreement. At t=0.38 there is moderate time pressure after many rounds of impasse, and the opponent has repeatedly signaled willingness to offer issueA/valueA, issueB/valueA, issueC/valueB, with issueD/E/F at valueC.
